name: cc-foundation-guide
description: Comprehensive reference for building with AI coding agents - project setup, context management, model strategy, and quality workflows. Includes getting-started guide for new users.
lessons_learned: bash set -u (nounset) causes issues with associative arrays in Git Bash - use set -eo pipefail instead
Notion publishing is page-level; inline databases may need to be opened as full pages for direct public URLs
Store external integration IDs in a tracked project file to make automation repeatable across sessions
Global commands (~/.claude/commands/) are available in all projects; project-level commands are project-only. Move universal commands global after verifying they work.
Retrofitting Foundation Package onto existing projects works well — backfill from git history and existing docs rather than starting from scratch
Comprehensive guides need a progressive companion doc — the full reference is valuable but too dense for onboarding. A 4-stage getting-started guide fills the gap.
